name: Diabetic Date Nut Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the orange marmalade, baking soda, shortening, flour, egg, chopped dates, cinnamon, nuts, and vanilla until well combined.
2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or grease it lightly.
3. Using a spoon, drop rounded teaspoonfuls of the dough onto the prepared baking sheet.
4. Preheat an oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown and set.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
7. This recipe makes about 36 cookies.
Source: "The Yankee Kitchen" 03-26-93 (#4) [Dorothy]
